title: Verify S3 Vectors existence and live report execution evidence
description:
Investigate user report that no working S3 vector-store report exists.

Validation scope:
- confirm S3 Vectors bucket/index exist in AWS
- run a real Semantic Reinforcement Memory report using S3 Vectors path
- capture report/task IDs and status evidence

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Starting verification now: checking CloudFormation outputs + direct S3 Vectors API calls, then running a live Semantic Reinforcement Memory report for evidence.

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Evidence: CloudFormation stack is UPDATE_COMPLETE and outputs include S3VectorBucketName=plexus-vectors-development, S3VectorIndexName=topic-memory-idx-development, S3VectorIndexArn=arn:aws:s3vectors:us-west-2:695039645615:bucket/plexus-vectors-development/index/topic-memory-idx-development. Direct boto3 s3vectors.get_index also succeeded for that bucket/index.

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Live verification run started: AWS_REGION=us-west-2 ENVIRONMENT=development python scripts/run_vector_topic_memory_report.py --scorecard 97 --days 180 (testing fallback/default S3 vectors resolution).

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Live run is executing successfully so far (no shell-mode config error). Task ID created: 5f3f900b-9ed1-4c36-b769-50405582b63f. Continuing to completion to capture final report evidence.

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Live run progress: report_id=92809f11-1b61-4382-a9e5-64baac91bcd1 task_id=5f3f900b-9ed1-4c36-b769-50405582b63f. Block log confirms default S3 vectors resolution and has indexed 166 documents; clustering in progress.

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Live run completed successfully. report_id=92809f11-1b61-4382-a9e5-64baac91bcd1 task_id=5f3f900b-9ed1-4c36-b769-50405582b63f. CLI output ended with 'Report completed successfully!'. This confirms an end-to-end working report execution through the S3 Vectors configuration path.
